structurePatterns: Off state = panel gray (#F3F3F3) track, white knob — NO blue tint track
On state = accent blue (#336EE8) track, white knob — the ONE place blue fill is legitimate
Knob is circular with no shadow — flat
Label = body text (14px) on left or right
usageHints: Use for binary settings that take immediate effect (no submit needed)
Toggle is the ONLY component where blue fill is allowed — it signals 'on'
Do not use for actions with secondary confirmation
doNotInvent: Green 'on' state — Aham uses blue #336EE8 for 'on'
Shadow on knob — Aham is flat
